entries.display_name: Caroma Tribute 390mm Square Above Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (above-counter / vessel). Sits ON bench surface; bench cutout is JUST a 32-40mm waste hole (ø varies by waste fitting). Tap is typically wall-mounted. Propose 'bathroom_basin_above_counter'.

entries.display_name: ADP Glory Under-Counter / Inset Basin 545 x 355mm
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (under-counter / inset, solid-surface). Retailer-published cutout: 470 x 304mm rounded rectangle for under-counter mounting; 510 x 344mm for inset. +/-5mm ceramic/solid-surface manufacturing tolerance. Closest existing schema fit is 'sink' but it's a basin — propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount' as a new Category.

entries.display_name: Caroma Cosmo Undermount/Inset Basin 400
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Dual-use — can be installed undermount or inset. 3.8L. Cutout via supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II 400mm Round Inset Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (inset / drop-in). Numeric cutout not published; install via supplied template. 7.5L bowl. Propose 'bathroom_basin_inset'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II 530mm Pill Inset Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (inset). 10.3L. 0/1 taphole variants. Cutout numeric not published — supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_inset'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Forma Semi Recessed Basin 500mm
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (semi-recessed). Reece technical guide referenced. Fixing via two D.250 brackets to underside of counter; sealed with acetic cured silicone (NOT epoxy). Numeric cutout dim is in the PDF diagram — not extracted to text by the search engine, so cutout omitted here per quality bar. Propose 'bathroom_basin_semi_recessed'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II 600mm Pill Semi-Inset Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (semi-recessed / semi-inset). Front portion of bowl projects PAST the bench front edge; bench cutout is a 'half cutout' open at the front. Numeric cutout not published in public spec. Propose 'bathroom_basin_semi_recessed'.

entries.model: Luna Semi Recessed Basin 1 Tap Hole (873615W)
entries.display_name: Caroma Luna Semi Recessed Basin 1 Tap Hole
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (semi-recessed). Overall dims and cutout numeric not published in retailer page; refer to Caroma supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_semi_recessed'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Urbane II Semi-Recessed Basin 500 1 Tap Hole
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (semi-recessed). Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_semi_recessed'.

entries.display_name: Stylus Venecia Semi-Recessed Basin 500
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (semi-recessed). Bowl protrudes past bench front edge. Cutout numeric not published — supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_semi_recessed'.

entries.display_name: ABI Zuri Rectangle Undercounter Basin 460mm
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 12mm rim thickness, 128mm internal depth. Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: ABI Zuri Rectangle Undercounter Basin 520mm Deep
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: ABI Zuri Round Undercounter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (round). Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: ADP Round Under-Counter Ceramic Basin 370mm
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (under-counter, round ceramic). Retailer-published cutout 305mm diameter. +/-5mm ceramic tolerance. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: American Standard Heron Under Counter Basin 500 No Taphole White
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 9L fireclay, undermount with supplied clips, integrated overflow, 32x40mm waste. Template included with product. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Argent Zen 540 Under Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (under-counter rectangular). No taphole. Overflow at front. Cutout not published — Argent supplies a template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Argent Zen 560 Deep Under Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Inner dim 500x315x120 deep. Cutout not published — supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Argent Zen Neu 535 Under Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Rectangular ceramic, NTH, with overflow. Cutout numeric not published — supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Cube 500 Under Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Caroma issues a paper cutout TEMPLATE with the basin and a DXF on request rather than publishing a numeric cutout dim in the public spec. 12.5L bowl. Cutout omitted deliberately — DO NOT FABRICATE; per quality bar, install requires the supplied template or a DXF request from Caroma. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano Under Counter Vanity Basin 430mm
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 32mm waste. Cutout omitted: Caroma supplies a printed cutout template with the basin and a DXF on request. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Caroma Urbane II 54cm Under Counter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Cutout numeric not published — DXF on request. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Fienza Karmen Undermount Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 9L, 142mm bowl depth. Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Fienza Koko Undermount Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 8L. Cutout numeric not published — measure from supplied template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Fienza Petra Undermount Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (large rectangular). 11L. Cutout numeric not published. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Fienza Sarah Undermount Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 9L bowl, 145mm depth, 32mm overflow waste. Fienza explicitly states cutout dim should be measured from the physical basin and not from spec drawings (liability disclaimer). Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Laufen Living Under Counter Basin 400 White
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin (compact). 8.5L, undermount fixing with supplied clips, 15-year domestic warranty. Cutout per supplied clips kit. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Posh Solus Under Counter Basin 530 x 365mm No Taphole White
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. 10.5L, 32x40mm waste, fireclay. Reece-supplied template traces cutout on benchtop and underlay. Cutout numeric in PDF diagram (not text-extracted). Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Roca Berna Undercounter Basin
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. Reece installation PDF available. Cutout dim is in PDF diagram (not text-extracted). Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: Roca Inspira Undercounter Basin 494 x 390
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: bathroom basin. FineCeramic, 13L, 100mm bowl depth. Cutout via supplied fixing kit + template. Propose 'bathroom_basin_undermount'.

entries.display_name: BeefEater Discovery 1100E 3 Burner Built-In
entries.notes: Cutout: 720W × 280H × 540D mm. Depth includes 20mm rear ventilation clearance. 30mm minimum rear clearance. 450mm minimum clearance to combustible materials all sides. Designed for non-combustible (stone/masonry) island installation. 3 × 17 MJ/h burners.

verification.issue: Cutout 720 x 540 plausible but not directly confirmed in fetched sources. Cited 30 mm rear clearance differs from 20 mm + 50 mm pattern in install excerpts.
verification.action: Re-fetch the BD16232 install PDF and confirm rear clearance and cutout figures before quoting.

entries.display_name: BeefEater Discovery 1100E 4 Burner Built-In
entries.notes: Cutout: 880W × 280H × 540D mm. 20mm rear ventilation included in depth. 30mm rear minimum, 450mm to combustibles. Stone/masonry-island only. Dual-fuel models BD16242 (NG/LPG variants).

entries.display_name: BeefEater Discovery 1100E 5 Burner Built-In
entries.notes: Cutout: 1035W × 280H × 540D mm. 20mm rear ventilation included. 30mm rear minimum, 450mm clearance to combustibles. Built-in for non-combustible islands only — DO NOT install in timber surrounds without insulating jacket.

entries.display_name: BeefEater Signature ProLine 6 Burner Built-In with Hood
entries.notes: ProLine integrated hood model. Cutout 1025 × 502mm. Total 71MJ/hr across 6 stainless burners. Flame failure device. 304 stainless construction. Designed for non-combustible benchtops/islands.

entries.display_name: Bull Angus 30-inch 4-Burner Built-In Gas Grill
entries.notes: US import, AU-stocked via Bigger Boyz Toyz and similar specialty retailers. Cutout 31" W × 9.5" H × 21" D = 787 × 241 × 533mm. 75,000 BTU. Built-in installation REQUIRES Bull insulating jacket if enclosure includes combustible materials — see Bull install manual.

entries.display_name: Crossray 4 Burner Infrared Built-In BBQ
entries.notes: Infrared ceramic burner technology. Cutout per build-in guide: 921mm W × 250mm H (drop-in face). Some versions of manual cite 928 × 260mm — verify against unit before cutting. 4 × 11MJ/h. 304 stainless lid + die-cast aluminium side panels. Lower heat radiation envelope than open-flame BBQs.

entries.display_name: Everdure FURNACE 3 Burner Built-In Gas BBQ
entries.notes: Cutout 1050 × 470mm. Manufacturer-specified bench thickness 20–60mm — flush install requires bench fall in this range. Minimum bench width 1220mm, depth 620mm. Recommended bench height 850mm. Heston Blumenthal-branded.

entries.display_name: Heatlie Island Gourmet Elite 600 316-Grade SS Drop-In
entries.notes: Smaller IGE — cavity 850W × 540D × 231H mm. Zero-clearance approved by Heatlie for combustible bench installation. 400 cm² ventilation to open air required. Australian-made flat-plate BBQ.

entries.display_name: Heatlie Island Gourmet Elite 850 316-Grade SS Drop-In

ventilation.notes: 400 cm² ventilation to open air required (per IGE manual)

entries.notes: Australian-made. Cavity 1105W × 540D × 231H mm. 'Zero clearance' technology — Heatlie explicitly approves install in benchtops of all kinds INCLUDING combustible materials, the only AU built-in BBQ to do so per manufacturer claim. Requires 400 cm² fixed ventilation to open air. 5mm mild steel hotplate; 316SS body. LPG or NG.

entries.display_name: Lynx Professional 30-inch Built-In Gas Grill
entries.notes: US import — verify AU certification with distributor. Cutout 29" W × 10.88" H × 24.50" D = 737 × 276 × 622mm. Trident infrared + ceramic burner + rotisserie. Lynx generally REQUIRES insulating jacket when installed in any combustible enclosure (consult Lynx install manual). Premium imported — limited AU distribution.

entries.display_name: Lynx Professional 36-inch Built-In Gas Grill
entries.notes: Cutout 35" W × 10.13" H × 22" D = 889 × 257 × 559mm. 1 Trident + 2 ceramic burners with rotisserie. AU availability via specialist outdoor-kitchen retailers. Insulating jacket strongly recommended for combustible enclosures — refer to Lynx install manual.

entries.model: HUS-SC88L-SS Outdoor Triple Glazed Alfresco Bar Fridge
entries.display_name: Schmick Outdoor Triple Glazed Alfresco Bar Fridge 98L
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY (rejected): outdoor alfresco bar fridge. Cavity required is 530w x 880h x 600d but this is CABINETRY/MASONRY cavity, NOT a stone bench cutout. Stone bench passes ABOVE the fridge — no cutout in stone. Included only to flag the install context: stone surround above the fridge needs an unsupported overhang spec. Recommend EXCLUDE from V3 catalogue (no stone CNC operation).

entries.display_name: Ziegler & Brown Turbo Classic 4 Burner Build-In
entries.notes: Classic 4-burner drop-in. Cutout dims approximate per supplied bracket dimensions; verify with Z&B install kit. Australian-designed. Stone/masonry island recommended; combustible install requires non-combustible liner per AS 5601.

entries.display_name: Billi B-3000 (Boiling, slimline tap)
entries.notes: Slimline tap variant — much smaller 22mm hole compared with Quadra/Eco's 32mm. Boiling only at this price point. Max bench thickness 54mm — larger window than other Billi taps.

entries.display_name: Billi B-3000 Sparkling (Boiling/Sparkling, slimline)
entries.notes: Slimline body, boiling + sparkling outputs. 22mm tap hole.

entries.display_name: Billi B-4000 (Boiling/Chilled)
entries.notes: Mid-range B/C unit. 32mm hole, 50mm max bench.

entries.display_name: Billi B-5000 (Boiling/Chilled, premium)
entries.notes: Top-tier B/C unit — premium under-bench cooling. 32mm hole.

entries.display_name: Billi B-5000 Sparkling (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: B/C/S variant of B-5000. Single 32mm tap hole, separate CO2 carbonator under bench.

entries.display_name: Billi Eco (Boiling/Chilled, single lever)
entries.notes: Eco range — single-lever interface. 32mm hole, max 50mm bench thickness.

entries.display_name: Billi Quadra Plus (Boiling/Chilled, dual lever)
entries.notes: 32mm hole — note this is smaller than Zip's 35mm. Bench thickness max 50mm. Standard install excludes natural stone benchtops over 48mm. Hole punch part 857901 available from Billi.

entries.display_name: Billi Quadra Sparkling Plus (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: Sparkling variant — adds CO2 carbonator under bench. Still single 32mm tap hole.

entries.display_name: Billi Sahara Plus (Boiling/Chilled)
entries.notes: Standard install excludes natural stone benchtops, or any benchtop over 48mm thick — this is a specific Billi exclusion. Sahara is the entry-level B/C tap in Billi's range.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator F-HC1100 Steaming Hot/Cold Filtered Tap
entries.notes: Hole accepts 35-38mm — flexible spec. 2.5L stainless steel under-bench tank (smaller than Zip/Billi/Quooker Command Centre). Tank within 600mm of tap, within 760mm of standard earth outlet.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator F-HC3300 Steaming Hot/Cold Filtered Tap (with chiller)
entries.notes: Adds active chilling vs HC1100. 35-38mm hole. Larger underbench unit.

entries.display_name: Quooker Classic Fusion (Boiling/Hot/Cold, traditional styling)
entries.notes: Classic styling (cross-handles, traditional spout) but 35mm hole same as modern Fusion.

entries.display_name: Quooker CUBE (Chilled/Sparkling carbonator add-on)
entries.notes: CUBE is an under-bench-only add-on that pairs with a Flex/Fusion to add chilled+sparkling outputs through the same tap. No bench cutout of its own. Cabinet allowance: 440mm deep x 235mm wide x 430mm high (+55mm for CO2 cylinder). Min 100mm rear ventilation, 20mm sides, 80mm above. Within 90cm of Quooker tank.

entries.display_name: Quooker Flex (Boiling, pull-out hose, with PRO3 tank)
entries.notes: 35mm hole. Flex requires 500mm deep x 200mm wide cabinet space below tap for the spring-counterweight pull-out hose. Tank options: PRO3 (3L), PRO7 (7L), COMBI (7L boiling + unlimited hot at 60°C). White tap support included for thin worktops. AU distribution via Quooker Australia.

entries.display_name: Quooker Fusion (Boiling/Hot/Cold mixer, with PRO3 tank)
entries.notes: Combined boiling + hot/cold mixer — replaces both the kitchen mixer and the boiling tap with a single 35mm hole. Tank options: PRO3, PRO7, COMBI.

entries.display_name: Quooker Nordic (Boiling-only, dedicated tap)
entries.notes: Nordic single-tap is boiling-only and uses a 32mm hole — note Nordic is the only Quooker with 32mm; all other Quookers use 35mm. Designed to be installed alongside a separate kitchen mixer.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G4 Arc (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling) — legacy
entries.notes: Legacy G4 model — being phased out in favour of G5. Listed for renovations replacing existing G4 systems. Same 35mm hole spec; different Command Centre footprint.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Arc (Boiling/Chilled)
entries.notes: Arc body, BC outputs. 35mm tap hole.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Arc (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: Arc variant has curved spout. Same 35mm tap hole as Classic. Optional Stand Alone Font Kit for Arc/Cube — sits on top of bench, eliminates need to drill at tap location, mounts ø108mm font footprint.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Celsius All-In-One (4-in-1, BCS + hot/cold mixer)
entries.notes: Combines HydroTap (boiling/chilled/sparkling) with a regular hot/cold mixer in a single tap body. Single 35mm hole replaces two holes (tap mixer + boiling tap). Cabinet must be 600mm wide x 600mm deep with off-centred drain.

entries.model: HydroTap G5 Classic Plus B (Boiling Only)
entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Classic Plus (Boiling Only)
entries.notes: Boiling-only variant. Smaller Command Centre option also available.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Classic Plus (Boiling/Chilled)
entries.notes: Boiling-Chilled variant of the Classic. Same 35mm hole, same Command Centre footprint. No CO2 required.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Classic Plus (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: G5 install spec: 35mm tap hole. Command Centre under-bench unit needs cabinet at least 600mm deep with ventilation. R290 refrigerant. Boiling capacity 100 cups/hr, chilled 75 glasses/hr. CO2 cylinder required for sparkling — sits in cabinet alongside Command Centre. Plumbing: cold feed 1.7-5 bar.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Cube (Boiling/Chilled)
entries.notes: Square Cube body, Boiling/Chilled outputs.

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Cube (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: Square-bodied Cube design. 35mm hole. Compatible with Stand Alone Font Kit (Arc/Cube/Elite range).

entries.display_name: Zip HydroTap G5 Elite (Boiling/Chilled/Sparkling)
entries.notes: Elite design — premium body with touch-screen interface. 35mm tap hole.

entries.display_name: Asko 90cm Pro Series Bridge Induction Cooktop HI1995G
entries.notes: 90cm Pro Series with Chef Mode, 6 zones with bridge function. Cutout 855x485 confirmed by Asko AU.

entries.display_name: BORA Pure 76cm Induction Cooktop with Integrated Recirculation Extractor PURU

ventilation.notes: Return-flow aperture of at least 500 cm² required for recirculation; min 25mm vertical clearance for return flow

entries.notes: Recirculation venting cooktop. 199mm overall height — major below-bench cabinet impact. Cutout 740±2 mm wide. Return-flow aperture ≥500 cm² (carbon filter exhaust path). Scrollbar control front. Connected load 7.6 kW. Stone fabricators must coordinate with cabinet maker on motor housing depth.

entries.display_name: BORA X Pure 83cm Induction Cooktop with Integrated Recirculation Extractor PUXU

ventilation.notes: Return-flow aperture ≥500 cm² required for recirculation

entries.notes: X Pure surface-mount with recirculation. 199mm height. 4 zones with FlexInduction. Verify exact cutout dims from BORA install manual; spec parity to PURU expected for cutout footprint scaling.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 4 60cm Induction Cooktop PUE611BB5E
entries.notes: Cutout 560 +2/-0 mm wide x 490-500 +2/-0 mm depth. Min 40mm to rear wall, min 16mm bench thickness. Frameless surface-mount.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 6 70cm Induction Cooktop PVS775HC1E
entries.notes: 70cm wide product but standard 560 wide cutout (490-500 depth). FlexInduction zone. Min 16mm bench thickness.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 8 80cm Flex Induction Cooktop PXE875DC1E
entries.notes: 80cm Series 8 surface-mount with frame. Cutout 750x490 (verify against product). Flex induction with extended FlexZones.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 8 80cm Induction Cooktop with Integrated Ventilation PXX875D34E
entries.notes: Venting hob (cooktop with integrated downdraft extractor). 198mm overall height — significant below-bench depth required for motor and ducting. Recirculation kit (cleanAir filters) included; ducted accessories sold separately. Verify exact AU cutout from installation manual; UK/AU spec parity expected.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 8 80cm Flex Induction Cooktop PXY875KW1E
entries.notes: 80cm Series 8 with frame. Cutout 796x516 mm (full-width unit cutout). 2 extended FlexZones. PerfectCook sensor ready, TFT display.

entries.display_name: Electrolux 60cm 4-Zone Induction Cooktop EHI645BD
entries.notes: FlexZone bridging. Hob2Hood compatibility. Stop & Go. Cutout 560x490 R5 (Electrolux/Westinghouse share platform; specs aligned).

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 90cm Series 7 5-Burner Gas Cooktop CG905DLPX1 (LPG)
entries.notes: Stainless steel 90cm gas cooktop. Gas connection 800-850mm above floor, ≥250mm outside product width on right. Earthed power outlet within 900mm of centre rear. Cutout dims from F&P install guide.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 90cm 5-Burner Gas-on-Glass Cooktop CG905DNGGB1 (NG)
entries.notes: Gas-on-glass 90cm cooktop, 5 burners including wok and 2 semi-rapid. Black ceramic glass with polished metal trim. Requires licensed gas technician install. Cutout dimensions from F&P installation guide.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 60cm Series 7 Induction Cooktop with SmartZone CI604DTB4

ventilation.notes: Ventilation must be at least 50mm diameter holes or equivalent area; base requires unrestricted ventilation to room

entries.notes: 60cm Series 7 with 2x SmartZones (bridge). 4mm front air gap required. Underside ventilation mandatory. Black glass.

entries.display_name: Miele 80cm Induction Cooktop KM 7373 FL
entries.notes: Surface-mount cutout 750-780 W x 490-500 D. Flush-fit cutout: internal 780x500, external 804x524. 4 zones with 800mm wide PowerFlex area. Cable 1440mm supplied loose.

entries.display_name: Miele 80cm Induction Cooktop KM 7464 FL
entries.notes: Standard surface-mount 80cm Miele induction cooktop, sibling of KM 7574 FL. Cutout 750x490.

entries.display_name: Miele 80cm Induction Cooktop KM 7574 FL
entries.notes: Surface-mount cutout 750x490 (raised recess option available with different dimensions for flush install: cutout 780x500 internal). 80cm flex induction with PowerFlex zones. Min 16mm worktop thickness. Cable length 1440mm.

entries.display_name: NEFF N90 80cm Induction Cooktop with Integrated Ventilation T58TS6BN0
entries.notes: Induction hob with integrated downdraft. 197mm overall height — significant below-bench cabinet space and ducting required. 4 zones with FlexInduction. Verify exact AU cutout from install manual; Bosch/Neff venting hob platform shares 780x500 typical.

entries.display_name: Smeg 60cm Gas Cooktop PGA64
entries.notes: 4-burner satin stainless gas cooktop. Cutout dims from AU spec sheet. 1.4m power cord, 50mm minimum front clearance per Smeg spec.

entries.display_name: Smeg 90cm Gas Cooktop PGA95-4
entries.notes: 5-burner classic gas cooktop, made in Italy. Cutout 847x482. Includes wok burner.

entries.display_name: Smeg 75cm Classic Gas-on-Glass Cooktop PV375N
entries.notes: 5-burner Classic gas-on-glass with ultra-rapid 4.2kW dual-flame burner. Black glass. Verify exact cutout against AU spec sheet — 700x480 typical for Smeg 75cm Classic gas range.

entries.display_name: Smeg 90cm Universale 6-Zone Induction Cooktop SAI3964B
entries.notes: 6-zone induction with multi-zone bridge. Black ceramic glass. AU spec PDF confirms cutout 860x490.

entries.display_name: Smeg 70cm Induction Cooktop SAI4744D
entries.notes: 70cm wide unit but only 555-560mm cutout. Black ceramic glass. AU spec sheet confirms cutout range 555-560 W x 478-482 D.

entries.display_name: Smeg 60cm Induction Cooktop SI2M7643DW (Linea, White)
entries.notes: Linea range. 4 zones with 2 multizone areas, 14 power levels. White ceramic glass. Topmount install.

entries.display_name: Westinghouse 60cm 4-Zone Ceramic Cooktop WHC642BC
entries.notes: 4-zone ceramic cooktop. Cutout 560x490 with R5 corners. Min 500mm rangehood clearance, 50mm front. Standard AU sub-bench induction/ceramic cutout footprint.

entries.display_name: Westinghouse 60cm 4-Burner Stainless Steel Gas Cooktop WHG644SC
entries.notes: 60cm gas cooktop, 4 burners with wok burner. Cast iron trivets. Cutout 560x480 typical for Westinghouse 60cm gas range.

entries.display_name: Westinghouse 90cm 5-Burner Stainless Steel Gas Cooktop WHG954SC
entries.notes: 5 burners with 14.4 MJ/h triple-ring wok burner. Cast iron trivets. Includes LPG conversion kit, secure clips and seal. Cutout 860x490 confirmed by Westinghouse AU.

entries.display_name: Westinghouse 60cm 4-Zone Induction Cooktop with BoilProtect WHI645BD
entries.notes: Cutout 560+1 W x 490+1 D, R5 corner radius. Min 25mm front, 8mm rear. Certified for zero rear clearance if required. Hob2Hood compatible. BoilProtect feature.

entries.display_name: Billi Alpine 060 (Chilled/Filtered)
entries.notes: Chilled/filtered only — no boiling. 32mm hole.

entries.display_name: Billi Alpine Sparkling (Sparkling, slimline)
entries.notes: Alpine = chilled/sparkling specialist (no boiling). Slimline 22mm tap hole.

entries.display_name: Puretec Tripla T1 (3-way Filter Mixer Tap)
entries.notes: 3-way mixer: cold, hot and filtered through the one body. 33mm hole. Undersink Z1 filter system separate. T1 is the gooseneck variant.

entries.display_name: Puretec Tripla T3 (3-way Filter Mixer, square)
entries.notes: Square spout variant of Tripla. 33mm hole.

verification.issue: Cited 33 mm hole diameter likely confuses tap shaft thread (33 mm) with the bench cutout (standard 35 mm tap hole).
verification.action: DO NOT USE. Verify against the Tripla T3 install guide.

entries.display_name: Puretec Tripla T4 (3-way Filter Mixer with LED)
entries.notes: T4 has LED temperature indicator on spout. Same 33mm hole.

entries.display_name: Puretec Tripla T6 (3-way Filter Mixer, Pull-Out)
entries.notes: Pull-out spray variant. 33mm hole.

entries.display_name: Puretec Z1-E10 Filtered Mixer Tap & Filter
entries.notes: Filter mixer with included Z1 cartridge (30,000L capacity). 35mm hole. Min pressure 50kPa, 100% stainless steel.

entries.display_name: Puretec Z1-E20 Filtered Mixer Tap & Filter
entries.notes: Taller gooseneck version of E10. 35mm hole.

entries.display_name: Blum LEGRABOX Pull-Out Waste Container
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Blum does NOT sell a bench-flap LEGRABOX bin variant in AU — these are all cabinetry pull-out systems mounted on LEGRABOX drawer hardware. Pure cabinetry.

entries.display_name: Hailo Cargo Pull-Out Cabinet Waste Bin
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Hailo distributes cabinet pull-out bins through Häfele AU. The Hailo Trio / 'bench-flush integrated bin' often described in marketing is in fact a CABINET door-mounted system, not a stone-bench cutout. Pure cabinetry.

entries.display_name: Hettich Bin.it Cabinet Pull-Out Waste System
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Hettich AU's primary integrated-bin offering is a pull-out cabinet system; there is no Mosaiq bench-flap variant currently sold by Hettich Australia. Pure cabinetry. No stone cutout.

entries.display_name: Hettich InnoTech Atira Pull-Out Waste System
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Cabinetry pull-out waste system on InnoTech Atira drawers.

entries.display_name: Häfele Worktop Waste Bin (Bench-Mount, Up to 40mm Stone)
entries.notes: GENUINE BENCH-INTEGRATED PRODUCT. Cutout: Ø 276mm circle. Stone thickness limit 40mm (suits 20mm + mitre or 40mm slab). Mounting kit includes a cutting template. Bin liners 20-90L hang from a stainless ring set into the stone, accessed by lifting a polished SS lid. Drip tray sits in the cabinet below. This is the canonical bench-flush waste solution AU stone fabricators see.

entries.display_name: Häfele Self-Closing Waste Disposal Flap (Bench Cutout)
entries.notes: GENUINE BENCH-INTEGRATED PRODUCT. Self-closing rectangular flap mounted into a benchtop cutout — outer trim is 330x195mm (vertical SS silk-matt), so the stone hole sits ~322x187mm to fit beneath the flange. Sweeps food waste through the flap into a pull-out bin in the cabinet below. Cutout corner radius and tolerance not published — confirm against the supplied cutting template before fabrication.

entries.display_name: Häfele Worktop Waste Bin 13L (Ø 276mm Hole)
entries.notes: GENUINE BENCH-INTEGRATED PRODUCT. Same Ø 276mm cutout as 502.54.709, but supplied with a fixed 13L graphite-grey bin instead of a bin-liner ring. Black plastic ring + polished SS lid above bench. Distributed by Häfele Australia.

entries.display_name: Wesco Bio-Double 40 DT-32 Built-in Pull-Out Bin (2 x 32L)
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Cabinet pull-out bin (400mm cabinet width). Pure cabinetry.

entries.display_name: Wesco Ergo Master Worktop Bin 11L (Ø 280mm Hole)
entries.notes: GENUINE BENCH-INTEGRATED PRODUCT. SS lid, plastic bucket. AU distribution via Wilbrad and similar; Wesco brand stocked by various AU kitchen retailers. Cutout Ø 280mm; ring outer Ø 310mm; depth below bench 300mm.

entries.display_name: Wesco Ergo Master Worktop Bin 5L (Ø 205mm Hole)
entries.notes: GENUINE BENCH-INTEGRATED PRODUCT. Compact 5L variant for prep waste. Cutout Ø 205mm; ring outer Ø 237mm; depth 230mm.

entries.model: Flushline 45L Single Laundry Tub With By-Pass
entries.display_name: Clark Flushline 45L Single Laundry Tub With By-Pass
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: laundry tub (FLUSHLINE — sits flush with stone, requires precise rebate around the lip). Australian-Made (Clark). Two by-pass holes for washing-machine grey water. Cutout numeric not published — manufacturer template. Propose 'laundry_tub' with mount_type 'flush'.

entries.model: Laundry 45L Tub with Rinse Bypass and Overflow (TI45S/OF)
entries.display_name: Oliveri Laundry 45L Inset Tub with Bypass
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: laundry tub (inset/drop-in). Australian-Made. Cutout 570 x 450mm published by retailer. Has rinse bypass holes for washing machine grey water — important install note: extra bench holes for bypass connection. Propose 'laundry_tub'.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Laundry 45L Undermount Tub
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: laundry tub in stone benchtop. Australian-Made (Oliveri). Identical workflow to undermount kitchen sink (rebate, brackets, sealant) but functionally distinct — typically deeper bowl, bypass plumbing for washing-machine grey water, often paired with a 600mm laundry cabinet. Propose 'laundry_tub'.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Laundry 70L Tub
entries.notes: GAP CATEGORY: laundry tub (large 70L). Australian-Made. Cutout numeric not published on retailer page. Propose 'laundry_tub'.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 6 Built-In Microwave BFL524MS0
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Built-in microwave (not a true drawer). AU equivalent is the BFL series in Bosch Australia's Serie 6/8 range. Cabinet niche install.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel Integrated CoolDrawer 36" RB36S
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. RB36S is the 36" sister to the 90cm AU CoolDrawer. Cabinetry install only.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 90cm Series 9 Integrated CoolDrawer Multi-Temperature Drawer
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. The CoolDrawer is sold in marketing imagery as an island/bench-integrated product, but in real AU installs it sits inside cabinetry under the benchtop. There is no stone cutout — the bench just spans across the cabinetry above. Categorised here as microwave_drawer in the type union (closest available drawer slot — see fold-back note: this is a multi-temperature fridge drawer). Custom door panel allows panel-ready cabinetry face. AU model RB90S64MKIW1.

entries.display_name: Gaggenau 200 Series Microwave Oven BMP 224 110
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Cabinetry-installed.

entries.display_name: Gaggenau 200 Series Microwave Oven BMP 225 100
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. AU 200-series microwave; cabinetry install. Gaggenau also offers 'flush' (inset) frame kits, but 'flush' refers to the cabinetry face, NOT a stone bench cutout.

entries.display_name: Gaggenau 400 Series 24" Microwave Drawer MW 420 620
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. US-spec 400-series drawer; not formally distributed by Gaggenau Australia. Even where supplied, it installs in cabinetry below bench, with 'flush inset' meaning the cabinet face — NOT a stone cutout.

entries.display_name: Miele Built-in Microwave Oven M 6160 TC (Generation 6000)
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Older Gen 6000 unit, largely superseded by M 7xxx series in AU.

entries.display_name: Miele 45cm Built-in Microwave Oven M 7140 TC
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. This is a 45cm built-in microwave (not a true under-bench drawer). Installs in a 560-568mm wide x 450-452mm high cabinet niche.

entries.display_name: Miele PureLine CleanSteel Built-in Microwave Oven M 7244 TC
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Built-in microwave for tall-cabinet install; not a bench-integrated drawer.

entries.display_name: Miele Built-in Microwave Oven M 7340 TC
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Cabinetry-installed only.

entries.display_name: NEFF N 70 Built-in Microwave NL4WR21G1
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. NEFF AU built-in microwave; cabinetry install (38cm tall niche). NEFF does not currently sell true under-bench drawer microwaves in Australia.

entries.display_name: Sharp 24" Insight Pro Microwave Drawer
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Older Insight Pro model, superseded by KB6525PK / SMD2470 series. Cabinetry-installed only.

entries.display_name: Sharp 24" Easy Open Microwave Drawer
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Cabinetry-installed only. AU available via Tempo / Sharp AU.

entries.display_name: Sharp 24" Microwave Drawer (Easy Wave Open, Flush Mount)
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Flush-mount in this context means the drawer face sits flush with adjacent CABINETRY, not flush with stone. AU distribution by Tempo. Installs into a 22 1/8" wide x 14 13/16" high x 23 1/2" deep cabinet niche, never into stone.

entries.display_name: Smeg Classic Built-in Microwave with Grill MI24XA
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Smeg AU does NOT offer a true under-bench microwave drawer; their built-in microwaves are all cabinetry-installed at eye level or in a tall-cabinet niche.

entries.display_name: Wolf 30" Professional Drawer Microwave MD30PE/S
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Wolf is not formally distributed in Australia (no AU agency at time of writing). Recorded for reference only — cabinetry install, US 120V.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Single Bowl Undermount Sink (Outdoor-Suitable)
entries.notes: Sonetto small undermount, 304 18/10 SS 1.2mm with 25mm radius corners and Softtone. 16L bowl. Suitable for indoor/outdoor use. 90mm basket waste. Lifetime warranty.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Standard Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Standard Sonetto. Minimum cabinet size 500mm. 90mm basket waste. 304SS 1.2mm. Suitable for outdoor alfresco bench installation when paired with stone.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Single Bowl Topmount Sink
entries.notes: Cutout template 1019 × 494mm × 10mm radius. Topmount with a flush-rim option. 304SS, 1.2mm. Suitable for outdoor kitchens; protect with cover when not in use.

entries.display_name: Falmec Downdraft 90 cm Pop-Up Worktop Rangehood
entries.notes: Pop-up worktop rangehood. Cutout 810mm × 98mm. Slides up behind cooktop, drops below bench when closed. Requires significant cabinet depth below for motor (~620mm). 150mm duct.

entries.display_name: Brilliant Bench Top Pop-Up Power Outlet, 3 GPO + 2 USB
entries.notes: Manual push/pull. ø100mm lid with adjustable collar suitable for 10–55mm bench thickness. IP54 splash rated. Includes 1m flex and plug. 3 x AU GPO + 2 x USB-A. RCM marked.

verification.issue: Cited cutout 100 mm diameter; source specifies 95 mm. 5 mm error on a stone hole means visible gap or no-fit.
verification.action: DO NOT USE. Re-fetch from official Brilliant Lighting install PDF.

entries.display_name: Clipsal OptiLine Pop-Up Twin Power Outlet, Stainless Steel
entries.notes: Auto-switched 2-pole 250V 10A. AS/NZS 3100 compliant (Schneider/Clipsal). Square stainless steel pop-up. IP44 splash and dust protected when down. Cutout tolerance ±0.5mm. Common in office and bench applications.

entries.display_name: Häfele Point Pod Compact Pop-Up Power Outlet, 2 GPO
entries.notes: Designed and developed in Australia. Hole size ø100mm; inner disk ø92mm; mounting flange ø160mm. Electric lift, push-to-open. Polyamide/ABS body with anodised aluminium top in white or black. AU GPO certified. Requires 450mm cabinet depth below bench.

entries.display_name: Häfele Point Pod Multi Pop-Up Power Outlet, 3 GPO + 2 USB
entries.notes: 3 x AU GPO + 2 x USB-A. Hole ø102mm (+0.3/-0.7mm), inner cup ø92mm. Mounting flange diameter 160mm. Requires 550mm depth below bench. Touch-activated electric lift, IP44 rated. Australian designed and manufactured.

entries.display_name: Modern Power V3M Motorised Pop-Up Power Outlet
entries.notes: Touch-activated motorised lift. ø102mm cutout, requires 400mm clearance below bench. AS/NZS certified GPO. USB-A and USB-C charging ports. Stainless top surface.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 6 90cm Downdraft Rangehood DDD96AM60
entries.notes: Telescopic downdraft hood. Stainless and tempered glass. Ducted and recirculating modes. Verify exact slot cutout against Bosch install manual.

verification.issue: Cutout 870 x 105 self-flagged by the source agent as unverified. Independent fetch confirmed only overall width 900 mm — slot dims not surfaced.
verification.action: Re-source from Bosch install manual before quoting.

entries.display_name: Falmec Downdraft 90 — 90cm Worktop Downdraft Rangehood
entries.notes: 90cm rising downdraft. Significant below-bench depth (~540mm) for motor and ducting. Verify exact slot cutout against Falmec install manual; 880x106 typical for the rising panel slot.

entries.display_name: Miele DA 6890 Levantar 90cm Downdraft Extractor
entries.notes: Pop-up downdraft rangehood. Sits behind cooktop; rises 300mm above bench when in use. 400mm below-bench clearance required for motor body. Verify exact slot cutout from Miele install manual — typical 894x106 for the rising panel slot.

entries.display_name: Sirius S-DD2-L 880mm Flush Top Downdraft Rangehood
entries.notes: Flush-top downdraft rangehood. Min cutout length 860mm, max 1000mm — 880mm nominal. Black glass with stainless or black trim. Height-adjustable brackets allow fine flush alignment. 4 speeds. Max ducting 7m to motor; subtract 1m per 90° elbow. Off-board motor option available.

entries.display_name: BeefEater Signature Built-In Side Burner
entries.notes: Signature built-in single side burner. Cutout 8.625" W × 16.25" D = 219 × 413mm. Drop-in style. Stainless steel.

entries.display_name: BeefEater Signature ProLine Built-In Side Burner with Lid
entries.notes: ProLine quad-burner side burner with lid. Cutout 325W × 480D mm. Stainless steel. RRP AUD $799 (2025 pricing). Pairs with ProLine BBQ models.

entries.display_name: Blanco Etagon 700-U Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Stainless steel satin polish. Multi-level Etagon system uses lateral rails - bench cutout R20. Cabinet base 800mm. Bowl inside depth 190mm.

verification.issue: Cited cutout 710 x 440 mm does not match source. Source shows cutout 700 x 400 mm with overall 730 x 460 mm — likely a values-mixed-up error.
verification.action: DO NOT USE. Re-fetch official AU Blanco install template before quoting.

entries.display_name: Blanco Subline 350/350-U Double Bowl Undermount Sink (Silgranit)
entries.notes: Silgranit (80% granite composite). Cabinet base 800mm. InFino drain system. Available in Anthracite, Black, White, Tartufo. Double 350x440 bowls.

entries.display_name: Blanco Subline 500-U Single Bowl Undermount Sink (Silgranit)
entries.notes: Silgranit single bowl undermount. Cabinet base 600mm. Bowl 500x400x190.

entries.display_name: Franke Centinox Minimalist CMX110-34 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Compact undermount, R10 minimalist corners. Bowl 340x410x175. Listed as 'discontinued' on Franke AU site but still widely available through retailers.

entries.display_name: Franke Centinox Minimalist CMX 210/610-50 1.5 Bowl Inset Sink
entries.notes: Minimalist 1.5 bowl with right-hand drainer. Topmount only. Reversible (left-hand drainer also available).

entries.display_name: Franke Kubus KBG110-34 Single Bowl Undermount Sink (Granite Composite)
entries.notes: Kubus is Franke's flush-mount-capable granite composite range. Cabinet base 450mm. Same external dimensions as MYX110-34 but in Fragranite.

entries.display_name: Franke Kubus KBG160 1.5 Bowl Undermount Sink (Granite Composite)
entries.notes: 1.5 bowl: large bowl 340x400x200, small bowl 160x400x130. Cabinet base 600mm.

entries.display_name: Franke Largo LAX110 50-41 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Largo range stainless steel undermount, shallower bowl (175mm) than Mythos. Tighter R10 corner. Sold in AU through Rawsons and others.

entries.display_name: Franke Maris MRG610-37 Single Bowl Sink (Fragranite)
entries.notes: Fragranite (granite composite) single bowl. Available in Onyx (ON), Polar White (PW), and other colours. Bench thickness up to 50mm. Heat resistant to 280C.

entries.display_name: Franke Maris MRG610-52 Single Bowl Sink (Fragranite)
entries.notes: Fragranite top-mount. Cabinet base 600mm. Fragranite is Franke's granite composite (80% quartz). Available in multiple colours including Onyx (ON), Stone Grey, Polar White (PW).

entries.display_name: Franke Mythos MTX 210/610-55 Single Bowl Inset Sink
entries.notes: Single bowl with right-hand drainer. Topmount/inset only. Cabinet base 600mm. 3.5 inch waste.

entries.display_name: Franke Mythos MYX110-34 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Premium 18/10 stainless steel undermount. Cabinet base 450mm. Remote waste optional (35mm hole in benchtop). Semi-integrated waste. 50-year warranty. FPC variant ships with extension drainer/rollamat/remote waste.

entries.display_name: Franke Mythos MYX110-45 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Cabinet base 550mm. 36L bowl. Cut-out template supplied. Mid-range option in the Mythos undermount line.

entries.display_name: Franke Mythos MYX110-55 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Cabinet base 800mm. The most common Mythos undermount in AU kitchens. R25 corner radius standard across Mythos line.

entries.display_name: Franke Mythos MYX110-70 Single Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Extra-large single-bowl Mythos. 56L. Cabinet base 800mm. Popular for island benches with single workhorse sink.

entries.display_name: Hafele Quartz Single Bowl Sink (G2)
entries.notes: Hafele's quartz composite (granite-comp) sink, sold as Onyx. Cabinet 500mm. Topmount cutout: 430x410. Undermount cutout: 390x370. R10 corners typical.

entries.display_name: Hafele Quartz Single Bowl Sink (Topmount)
entries.notes: Same Hafele 570.30.260 sink, but with the topmount cutout. The sink is sold as a dual-mount product; cutout differs by orientation.

entries.display_name: Mercer Aurora Single Bowl Sink 500mm
entries.notes: Mercer is NZ-headquartered but the Aurora range is broadly distributed in AU. 25mm flat flange means flush-mount install possible with rebate. R10 corner. Bowl=cutout for undermount.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Standard Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: 304 grade 18/10 brushed stainless. Min cabinet 500mm. Cutout = bowl dimensions for undermount; check Oliveri PDF template at install. Australian-designed range.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Large Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Sonetto large 39L bowl. Cabinet 600mm. 90mm waste, ships with bench-top drainer tray accessory.

entries.display_name: Oliveri Sonetto Double Bowl Undermount Sink
entries.notes: Double bowl Sonetto. Cabinet base 900mm. Twin 30L bowls. R10 internal radius. Australian Oliveri spec PDF available.

entries.display_name: Phoenix 4000 Series 1 & 3/4 Left Hand Bowl Sink (Universal Mount)
entries.notes: Asymmetric 1.75 bowl with the smaller half on the left. Universal-mount; lipless. Right-hand variant also available.

entries.display_name: Phoenix 4000 Series Double Bowl Sink (Universal Mount)
entries.notes: Universal-mount double bowl. 33L per bowl. Cabinet base 900mm typical. Cutout = sink footprint as the design is lipless.

entries.display_name: Phoenix 4000 Series Extra Large Single Bowl Sink 700mm
entries.notes: Universal-mount. Largest single-bowl in the 4000 Series. Cabinet base 800mm typical.

entries.display_name: Phoenix 4000 Series Large Single Bowl Sink (Universal Mount)
entries.notes: Universal-mount, no lip. 50L capacity. Cutout = sink footprint. Available in SS and Brushed Carbon.

entries.display_name: Phoenix 4000 Series Single Bowl Sink (Universal Mount)
entries.notes: Universal mount: same sink can be installed undermount or overmount. The 4000 Series has no integrated lip - the sink walls are vertical and the bowl dimensions = sink dimensions. 304 grade SS, 1.2mm. Hand-welded. Centre back waste. 33L capacity. Available in Stainless Steel and Brushed Carbon (PVD).

entries.display_name: Schock Mono N-100 Single Bowl Sink (Cristadur, distributed by Abey)
entries.notes: Cristadur granite composite. 5 tap-hole drillings (knock-outs) on tap ledge. Distributed in AU by Abey. Topmount with reversible orientation.

entries.display_name: Schock Quadro N-100L Single Bowl Sink (Cristadur)
entries.notes: Cristadur. Distributed in AU by Abey. Available in Onyx, Nero, Alpina, Croma. Cabinet base 600mm. Topmount; undermount cutout is 490x370 (bowl size) when used inverted.

entries.display_name: Schock Quadro N-100L Single Bowl Undermount Sink (Cristadur)
entries.notes: Same sink as the Quadro N-100L overmount but inverted for undermount install. Cutout = bowl size (490x370). The Quadro range is reversible/dual-mountable.

entries.display_name: Schock Signus N-100XL Large Single Bowl Sink (Cristadur)
entries.notes: Large Cristadur single bowl - 790x500 footprint. Cabinet base 800mm. Sold in AU by Abey. Reversible. Topmount and undermount versions available with different cutouts.

entries.display_name: Schock Typos Single Bowl with Drainer Topmount Sink
entries.notes: Topmount with built-in drainer. Cristadur. Cabinet base 600mm. Single bowl; 1.75 variant (TD200) has 1160x500 footprint. Sold by Abey AU.

entries.display_name: Caroma G Series Soap Dispenser
entries.notes: Caroma G Series install spec: deck thickness max 50mm; mounting hole Ø26-30mm. Smaller hole than typical 35mm tap. Bottle re-fillable from above on most variants.

entries.display_name: ABI Elysian Bench-Mounted Minimal Mixer
entries.notes: ABI specification states benchtop must not exceed 30mm thickness. 35mm bench hole. 25-year warranty. Finishes: brushed brass, brushed nickel, brushed copper, brushed gunmetal, white, matte black, chrome.

entries.display_name: ABI Elysian Commercial Pull-Out Kitchen Mixer
entries.notes: Commercial-style pull-out with internal flexi hose. ABI Elysian family 30mm max bench. Available in brushed brass, brushed copper, brushed gunmetal, stainless steel.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II Pull Down Sink Mixer with Dual Spray
entries.notes: Pull-down with 2 handle options (Liano II pin or Urbane II paddle). Caroma installation specifies 35mm hole and 40mm max bench.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II Sink Mixer (Chrome, Lead Free)
entries.notes: 25mm ceramic disc cartridge; 35mm bench hole. Caroma installation instructions for Liano II family specify max 40mm bench. Available in chrome, matte black, brushed nickel, brushed brass, gunmetal.

entries.display_name: Caroma Liano II Pull Out Sink Mixer (Chrome, Lead Free)
entries.notes: Pull-out handpiece with dual-rotation outlet (70°/140°). 35mm bench hole; 40mm max bench thickness per Caroma installation guides. WELS 5-star (6 L/min) with optional 6-star (4.5 L/min) aerator.

entries.display_name: Caroma Urbane II Pull Out Sink Mixer (Chrome, Lead Free)
entries.notes: Urbane II IS1900B pull-out sink mixer; 140°/70° swivel retainer. Caroma 35mm bench hole and 40mm max bench (consistent across Liano II / Urbane II family).

entries.display_name: Fienza Empire Slim Sink Mixer
entries.notes: 35mm European cartridge, stainless steel construction; extended arch outlet with swivel. Hole and bench window inferred from Fienza standard 35mm install pattern — verify against installation insert. Finishes: chrome, matte black, brushed nickel, gunmetal.

entries.display_name: Fienza Empire Slim Pull-Out Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Pull-out spray with normal+spray modes; max reach 430mm. Bench window inferred from standard Fienza pattern — installation insert recommended for verification.

entries.display_name: Greens Astro II Gooseneck Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Greens Astro II Gooseneck official spec sheet: 35mm hole and max bench 50mm — generous range covers thick stone benches without an extension kit. Available in chrome and brushed nickel.

entries.display_name: Greens Astro II Pull-Down Sink Mixer (Lead Free)
entries.notes: Greens Astro II Pull-Down spec sheet: 35mm mounting hole, 40mm max bench. WELS-rated, lead-free. Variants in chrome (LF254383CP) and brushed nickel (LF254383BN).

entries.display_name: Greens Astro II Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Greens Astro II core sink mixer: 35mm hole, 40mm max bench.

entries.display_name: Greens Galiano Pull-Down Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Greens Galiano installation guide: 35mm hole, 38mm max bench. For Formica/wooden bench tops Greens recommends extra mounting support; on stainless ensure mounting washer is against steel.

entries.display_name: Meir Round Kitchen Mixer Tap
entries.notes: 35mm Sedal ceramic cartridge; max benchtop 45mm per Meir round series spec. Solid brass. Variants: MK02 matte black, MK02-C chrome, MK02-CH champagne, MK02-PVDBN brushed nickel, MK02-PVDGM shadow gunmetal.

entries.display_name: Meir Round Gooseneck Kitchen Mixer Tap
entries.notes: Round gooseneck; same Meir round-series 35mm hole / 45mm max bench. Paddle (MK03PD) and pinless (MK03PN) handle variants.

entries.display_name: Meir Round Pull Out Kitchen Mixer Tap
entries.notes: 35mm Sedal ceramic cartridge; Neoperl aerator; pull-out two-function. Meir round-series 35mm hole / 45mm max bench. Variants MK07 matte black, MK07-C chrome.

entries.display_name: Meir Round Piccola Pull Out Kitchen Mixer Tap
entries.notes: Compact 'Piccola' variant of pull-out; 35mm hole / 45mm max bench. Multiple finishes: matte black, chrome (-C), champagne (-CH), brushed nickel (-PVDBN), tiger bronze (-PVDBB), shadow gunmetal (-PVDGM).

entries.display_name: Methven Aurajet Aio Hi-Rise Sink Mixer with Pull Out Spray
entries.notes: Hi-rise (gooseneck) Aurajet Aio with pull-out aerated/spray. Methven AU spec sheets cite 35mm hole and 40mm max bench. Ceramic disc cartridge.

entries.display_name: Methven Minimalist Spring Pull Down Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Methven installation guide specifies suitable hole 35-38mm diameter and bench top max 30mm. Spring-arm design with 2-function pull-down spray (spray + aerated). 4-star WELS, 7 L/min.

entries.display_name: Methven Aio Sink Mixer Chrome
entries.notes: Aurajet-styled single lever; swivel spout; 35mm cartridge; max bench thickness 40mm per Methven spec. Slim-stream aerator; 4-star WELS, 7.5 L/min mains pressure. Stainless steel flexible inlet hoses.

entries.display_name: Methven Centique Single Lever Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Methven Centique installation instructions specify max bench top thickness 40mm and 35mm mounting hole. Ceramic disc cartridge.

entries.display_name: Mizu Drift MK2 Gooseneck Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Reece-distributed Mizu range. Spec sheet: 35mm hole, 38mm max bench. WELS 4-star or 5-star (lead-free) variants. Finishes: chrome, matte black, brushed nickel, brushed gold.

entries.display_name: Mizu Drift MK2 Gooseneck Pull Out Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Pull-out variant of Drift MK2; same 35mm hole and 38mm max bench.

verification.issue: 35 mm hole confirmed; 5–38 mm bench thickness window plausible but not independently confirmed via search excerpts.
verification.action: Confirm bench thickness window from Reece-issued Mizu spec PDF before relying on the upper bound.

entries.display_name: Mizu Soothe Sink Mixer with Pullout Spray
entries.notes: Mizu Soothe pull-out spray; 25mm cartridge. Reece spec consistent with Mizu range: 35mm hole / 38mm max bench. Bench thickness inferred from Mizu range standard — verify for individual finish variants.

entries.display_name: Nero Mecca Kitchen Mixer
entries.notes: Nero Mecca official spec PDF: 35mm pre-drilled hole; bench thickness 3-40mm; 35mm ceramic disc cartridge. Finishes: chrome (-CH), matte black (-MB), brushed nickel (-BN), gunmetal (-GR), brushed gold (-BG).

entries.display_name: Nero Mecca Pull Out Sink Mixer with Vegie Spray
entries.notes: Pull-out variant of Mecca; same Mecca-family spec: 35mm hole, 3-40mm bench thickness. With vegie spray (aerated/spray pull-out).

entries.display_name: Nero Bianca Pull Out Sink Mixer with Vegie Spray
entries.notes: Nero Bianca spec PDF: 35mm hole; max bench 40mm without stabiliser, 30mm with stabiliser fitted. Square design. Available in chrome (-CH), matte black (-MB), brushed nickel (-BN), gunmetal (-GR), brushed gold (-BG).

entries.display_name: Nero Dolce Kitchen Mixer Square
entries.notes: Dolce square kitchen mixer; Nero family 35mm hole / 3-40mm bench. Solid brass, 35mm ceramic cartridge.

entries.display_name: Phoenix Vivid Slimline Wall Sink Mixer Set
entries.notes: Wall-mounted Vivid Slimline sink/basin set with 180mm or 230mm spout reach. Wall-mounted — NO benchtop hole drilled. Stone fabricator should verify wall noggin and tile-face setout (45-65mm setback) but no cutout in stone.

entries.display_name: Phoenix Vivid Slimline Pull Out Sink Mixer 200mm
entries.notes: Pull-out two-function spray (aerated/spray); 35mm ceramic cartridge. Vivid Slimline max bench thickness 30mm. Variants: -00 chrome, -10 matte black, -12 brushed gold, -30 gun metal, -40 brushed nickel.

entries.display_name: Phoenix Vivid Slimline Sink Mixer 220mm Gooseneck
entries.notes: Top-mounted lever sink mixer; 35mm ceramic disc cartridge; 360° swivel spout. Vivid Slimline range max bench thickness 30mm per Phoenix spec sheets. Available in chrome, matte black, brushed nickel, brushed gold, gun metal.

entries.display_name: Phoenix Vivid Slimline Sink Mixer 220mm Squareline
entries.notes: Squareline (90-degree spout) Vivid Slimline; 35mm ceramic cartridge. Vivid Slimline range max bench thickness 30mm. Finishes: chrome (CHR), matte black (MB), brushed nickel (BN), brushed gold (BG), gun metal (GM).

entries.display_name: Phoenix Vivid Slimline Side Lever Sink Mixer 220mm Gooseneck
entries.notes: Side-lever mixer; 35mm ceramic cartridge. Spec sheet states max 30mm bench thickness. C-gasket and C-washer assembly. Common variants: VS733 MB (matte black), VS733 BG (brushed gold).

entries.display_name: Sussex Voda Sink Mixer
entries.notes: Sussex installation guide specifies mixer clearance hole 40-45mm and outlet hole 22-28mm; max bench 32mm. WELS 5-star, 5 L/min. Optional base flange available. Wider hole than typical 35mm — verify before drilling.

entries.display_name: Sussex Voda Sink Mixer Pull Out
entries.notes: Pull-out spray variant of Voda; same 40-45mm clearance hole and 32mm max bench per Sussex installation guide.

entries.display_name: AEG 14cm Warming Drawer KDE911424M
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Niche: 560mm W x 141mm H x 550mm D. AU stock through Electrolux Group.

entries.display_name: Bosch Series 6 Warming Drawer 14cm BIC510NS0B
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Niche: 560-568mm W x 140mm H x 550mm D. AU spec is BIC510NS0A (same dimensions). Cabinetry install.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 60cm Series 9 Minimal Warming Drawer WB60SDEB2
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Niche: 560mm W min x 140mm H min x 550mm D min. Cabinetry-installed only.

entries.display_name: Fisher & Paykel 60cm Series 9 Minimal Tall Warming Drawer WB60SDTEB1
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Tall variant; niche 560mm W min x 292mm H min x 550mm D min.

entries.display_name: Miele Gourmet Warming Drawer 14cm ESW 7010
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. 14cm-high gourmet warming drawer; installs in a 560-568mm wide x 140mm high cabinet niche. Pure cabinetry product.

entries.display_name: Miele Gourmet Warming Drawer 29cm ESW 7020
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. 29cm-high warming drawer; cabinetry install.

entries.display_name: NEFF N 90 Warming Drawer 14cm
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. NEFF AU warming drawer. Cabinetry install. Same BSH-platform niche as Bosch BIC510.

entries.display_name: Smeg Dolce Stil Novo 14cm Warming Drawer CPR315N
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. Matte-black push-to-open variant; cabinetry install.

entries.display_name: Smeg Classic 14cm Warming Drawer CPRA315X
entries.notes: No benchtop interaction — included for reference. AU model. Cabinetry install. Smeg also offers CPR315N (matte black) and CPRA315MB (matte black classic).

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Badger 5 Food Waste Disposer
entries.notes: Entry-level continuous-feed unit. 0.5hp. 3-bolt mount. No built-in air switch — uses standard wall switch wiring. ø90mm AU waste; discharge 1-1/2" (38mm) slip-joint.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator E75 Food Waste Disposer
entries.notes: E-series with Quick Lock mounting (twist-on/off, not 3-bolt). Air switch is an optional accessory — if specified, requires ø22mm bench or sink-deck hole for the pneumatic button.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Evolution 100 Food Waste Disposer (Compact)
entries.notes: Compact body for smaller cabinets — height 311mm, narrower than Evolution 200. 2-stage grind. Built-in air switch (chrome). 5-year warranty. ø90mm AU waste fitting.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Evolution 200 Food Waste Disposer
entries.notes: AU 240V model is 0.75hp. AU sinks: ø90mm waste hole standard. 3-stage MultiGrind. Built-in air switch — needs an extra ø??mm hole on the bench OR sink for the pneumatic button (commonly ø32mm). Discharge outlet 38mm slip-joint.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Evolution 250 Food Waste Disposer (3X)
entries.notes: Top-tier domestic model. 3-stage grind, handles bones. AU ø90mm waste fitting. Air-switch button hole required — typically ø32mm in bench or sink deck. 8-year warranty.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Model 56 Food Waste Disposer
entries.notes: Entry M-Series, 0.55hp, 1-stage grind, 980ml chamber. Built-in air switch. ø90mm AU waste.

entries.display_name: InSinkErator Model 66 Food Waste Disposer
entries.notes: Top of M-Series. 0.75hp, 980ml chamber, polished flange, built-in air switch. ø90mm waste.

entries.display_name: Bosch 30cm Domino Gas Wok Burner PRA326B70E
entries.notes: 30cm domino single wok burner (6kW dual array burner). Flame failure device. Designed to combine alongside other 30cm or 60cm domino units. Verify exact AU cutout from installation manual.
